Class PrimitiveType

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction.PrimitiveType
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProgramModelElement, Type, ModelElement, NamedModelElement
public final class PrimitiveType extends Object implements Type
A program model element representing primitive types.

    ProgramElementName
    getArrayElementName()
    Returns the specific name of this primitive type used in array types.

    Gets the name of the LDT corresponding to this primitive type.

    getDefaultValue()
    returns the default value of the given type according to JLS ???4.5.5 ATTENTION: usually for byte and short this should be (byte) 0 (rsp.

    • getDefaultValue

      public Literal getDefaultValue()
      returns the default value of the given type according to JLS ???4.5.5 ATTENTION: usually for byte and short this should be (byte) 0 (rsp. (short)0) but currently is just 0.
      Specified by:
      getDefaultValue in interface Type
      Returns:
      the default value of the given type according to JLS ???4.5.5

    • getFullName

      public String getFullName()
      Returns the name of type.
      Specified by:
      getFullName in interface ProgramModelElement
      Returns:
      the full name of this program model element.

      public String toString()
      Returns the name of type.

      Returns:
      the full name of this program model element.

      public ProgramElementName getArrayElementName()
      Returns the specific name of this primitive type used in array types.

    • isIntegerType

      public boolean isIntegerType()
      Returns whether this is a Java type which translates to int in DL.

    • isArithmeticType

      public boolean isArithmeticType()
      Returns true if this is an integer or floating point type.

    • getCorrespondingLDTName

      public Name getCorrespondingLDTName()
      Gets the name of the LDT corresponding to this primitive type.
      Returns:
      may be null if no name set
